tasks.label: Create Module
tasks.command: set -euo pipefail; M='${input:moduleName}'; ROOT='${workspaceFolder}'; SVC="$ROOT/service/src/modules/$M"; ADM="$ROOT/admin/src/modules/$M/views"; mkdir -p "$SVC/controller/admin" "$SVC/controller/app" "$SVC/service" "$SVC/entity" "$ADM"; printf '%s\n' '{}' > "$SVC/db.json"; printf '%s\n' '[]' > "$SVC/menu.json"; echo "模块已创建: $M"; echo "  service: $SVC/controller/admin, $SVC/controller/app, $SVC/service, $SVC/entity, $SVC/db.json, $SVC/menu.json"; echo "  admin:   $ADM"; echo "说明: db.json 表名用 模块名_ 前缀；menu.json 仅当存在 模块名_menu 表时才会种子导入，后台菜单通常写在 base/menu.json"

tasks.label: Create Component
tasks.command: set -euo pipefail; M='${input:moduleName}'; C='${input:componentName}'; ROOT='${workspaceFolder}'; SVC="$ROOT/service/src/modules/$M"; ADM="$ROOT/admin/src/modules/$M/views/$C"; if [[ ! -d "$SVC" ]]; then echo "模块不存在: $M（请先运行 Create Module）" >&2; exit 1; fi; mkdir -p "$SVC/entity" "$SVC/service" "$SVC/controller/admin" "$ADM"; touch "$SVC/entity/$C.ts" "$SVC/service/$C.ts" "$SVC/controller/admin/$C.ts" "$ADM/index.vue"; echo "组件已创建: $M / $C"; echo "  $SVC/entity/$C.ts"; echo "  $SVC/service/$C.ts"; echo "  $SVC/controller/admin/$C.ts"; echo "  $ADM/index.vue"; echo "可用 snippet: entity / controller / vm-crud 填充内容"

inputs.description: 模块名（目录名，如 shop；表前缀 模块名_*）
组件名（如 goods → entity/service/controller/admin + admin views）
